prompt: Construction site hoarding panels at a residential renovation site in an Adelaide suburb. Clean white hoarding panels feature ultra-minimal branding: large letters L and K in a thin elegant sans-serif typeface like Futura Light with delicate slim strokes in charcoal (#2C2C2C), with a tiny gold (#C9A96E) square dot between the L and K. Below in very small widely-spaced thin text, DESIGN AND BUILD. The phone number 0481 742 026 and lkdesignandbuild.com.au appear in small charcoal text. The extreme simplicity and white space of the design stands out as confidently minimal. Adelaide suburban setting with neat houses nearby, clear blue sky above, residential street in the foreground. Professional architectural photography.
negative_prompt: dirty hoarding, graffiti, torn panels, ugly construction site, rubbish, mud, overcast sky, industrial area, cheap printing, faded colors, nighttime, cartoon, low quality, bold heavy text, busy, cluttered

settings.camera_angle: eye level, slight angle along hoarding run
